programs.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programs.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programs.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programs.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programs.title: Joni Table Talk
programs.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programs.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programs.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Mike returns to the bear-infested crags of Kodiak to reclaim his mountain goat kill; Jason hunts down a wild hog to feed his family; Kidd and Harry blow up a beaver dam to save their water supply; Josh goes on the offensive against wolves.

programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Jake's second mountain lion chase in the Ruby Valley leaves him cliffed out; Eustace and Raleigh turn scrap steel into pure profit; Kidd sets off on a whitewater excursion unlike any other; Jason picks up the pieces after a storm drops a tree.
